title: Traceability of disinfection for public transportation during COVID times
excerpt:

posts.author: jeromeskiply (Jerome Chambard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there ,
Here in France, we are experimenting a new lockdown. The rules are more flexible, but that also means we have to find new solutions. And one of them if to ensure that the disinfection work is done on time. This is what we developed with a local transportation operator, based on monday.com and our iot solutions: COVID solution: traceability of disinfection for public transportation - Skiply
We see a large potential for this application everywhere in the world, and we hope it will help to improve the situation.
